creator: yinjieh@csie.nctu.edu.tw
text:
Dear Edwin,

  I approve this patch, please commit it, thanks!

On Sun, Dec 24, 2006 at 10:00:52AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of x11-toolkits/gtkmathview,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/107168 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/107168
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
